body:
“He’s such a fucking prick,” are the first words I hear as I pick up the phone. “But I told him I was done with him and his only response was ‘Goodbye!’ Come help me forget the asshole!” And so Friday I shove a bag of weed into my purse before going out to comfort my best friend. I know how she wants to forget.

Her apartment smells a bit like alcohol and weed already when I arrive. She’s sprawled across the couch waiting for me, her eyes devouring me from head to tow as I walk through the door and she flicks her cigarette into an overfull tray. I pop beside her on the couch and spark up a joint for us to share as I cuddle and lean against her, “Big spoon?” she asks with a grin, and I oblige, sliding behind her, my hips against hers, holding the joint for us both, as she wiggles and grinds lightly against me.

She smells of vanilla, sweat, cloves, alcohol, and weed…and something about the mixture is magical to my slightly addled brain. reblog_comment:
“He’s such a fucking prick,” are the first words I hear as I pick up the phone. “But I told him I was done with him and his only response was ‘Goodbye!’ Come help me forget the asshole!” And so Friday I shove a bag of weed into my purse before going out to comfort my best friend. I know how she wants to forget.

Her apartment smells a bit like alcohol and weed already when I arrive. She’s sprawled across the couch waiting for me, her eyes devouring me from head to tow as I walk through the door and she flicks her cigarette into an overfull tray. I pop beside her on the couch and spark up a joint for us to share as I cuddle and lean against her, “Big spoon?” she asks with a grin, and I oblige, sliding behind her, my hips against hers, holding the joint for us both, as she wiggles and grinds lightly against me.

She smells of vanilla, sweat, cloves, alcohol, and weed…and something about the mixture is magical to my slightly addled brain. I hold the joint against her lips as she inhales, fascinated watching the way her lips touch the paper, idly wondering how the same action would feel against me instead. She exhales toward the ceiling, twisting to look up at me laying behind her. Her eyes light up playfully with a thought, “Dance with me,” she suggests, rolling off the couch and pulling me up, so our bodies are touching and we stand there, face to face, joint still in my hand.

Her dress clings to her body, leaving little to the imagination, and I can’t help bite my bottom lip, as she spins for me, her dress lifting with the spin and showing the lack of clothing underneath. She leans back against me, giggling as she nips my earlobe, teasing me, her body pressed hard against mine as she sways, my arms wrapping around her to pull her even closer, the heat trapped between us, making us both even hotter. The joint burns away, forgotten in my hand by her body against mine, she pulls my hand up to her face, kissing the back and giggling “Milady!” before taking a long hard drag, smirking wide as my face flushes.

My eyes are locked on her, watching her thighs and the way the dress rides up them, savoring every touch of her body against my own, knowing she knows exactly the impact she’s having on me. The next song comes on, heavy with bass, causing her to mount and grind against my thigh in rhythm. She kisses up my neck, sending shivers trough me until her mouth is at my ear and tells me with no hesitation in her voice, “Guess who’s gonna fuck her best friend tonight?”

I wanna fuck, fuck, fuck my best friend
Fuck, fuck, fuck my best friend
Fuck, fuck, I wanna fuck you
I wonder what, what, what does she want
What, what, what does she want
What, what, you wanna fuck me too…
